name: Anaxa | Monitoring (Best Friend)
description:
“Let’s talk all night ‘til the sun comes up, doesn’t matter if you cry some more”

In your darkest times, your coworker and best friend is at your door, hoping to help you.

Oops, disappeared for like 3 weeks. Uhhh here’s an Anaxa bot I was working last week and forgot about because of life stuff. I tried to add the music mania tag but it’s broken for some reason? I’ll see if I can get it working soon (it works now). It’s basically the same as the other Monitoring Anaxa bot but this is from Anaxa’s aka the best friend’s pov. Same modern au. Lowkey annoyed with this bot ngl, I just wanted to feed yall because it’s been a while.

Also for those that play genshin, what do yall think about Nod Krai?

Original Anaxa Monitoring
